description_long: This object consists of three modern, two-story houses arranged side by side, each with a flat roof and a minimalist, boxy design. The facades are primarily white and light gray, with some sections featuring wood or stone-textured panels for accent. Each house has a prominent front entryway with steps leading up to the door, and large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The driveways and walkways are clearly defined, with one or two small trees or shrubs placed in the front yards for landscaping. The garages are integrated into the main structure, with visible garage doors facing the street. The overall appearance is clean, geometric, and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A set of three modern, flat-roofed, two-story houses with white and gray facades, large windows, and integrated garages. The design is minimalist and geometric, with landscaped front yards and prominent entryways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facades, entryways, large windows, and garage doors, with landscaping visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the houses, the flat roofs, and the placement of trees near the driveways.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back walls, smaller windows, and the overall boxy structure of the houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the houses, with similar features to view 1 and visible driveways.
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent front steps leading to recessed doors, with minimal overhangs and clean, geometric lines.
